meta_title: For Students: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Design with AI to Fix Debugging Roadblocks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster and build professional-grade student projects.
content.answer_block: Debugging is not about fixing errors; it is about architectural clarity. By utilizing AI-assisted design, you shift from reactive patching to proactive engineering. Use Antigravity to map your logic flows and Claude Code to automate the resolution of complex stack traces, turning every bug into a learning milestone.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal flooded with red text, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat in a void. You’ve spent hours tracing variables, yet the logic remains elusive. This isn't a lack of intelligence; it’s a bottleneck in your mental model of the system you’re building.

True engineering isn't about memorizing syntax; it's about mastering the flow of data. By integrating AI into your design process, you transform from a struggling coder into a systems architect. We are going to turn those cryptic errors into a clear roadmap, ensuring your next build is not just functional, but resilient.

steps.title: Map the Failure Point
steps.description: Before fixing code, visualize the data flow. Use AI to identify where the state transition fails.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file structure and map the state flow for this feature. Identify potential race conditions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --plan 'Analyze the logic flow in src/services and identify the state mismatch.'

steps.title: Isolate the Logic
steps.description: Refactor the problematic block into a pure, testable function to eliminate environmental noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest a modular refactor for this block to improve testability and isolate the logic from side effects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --refactor 'Extract the logic in index.ts into a pure function and add unit tests.'

steps.title: Automate Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed the full stack trace into the AI to identify root causes instead of surface-level symptoms.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this stack trace and correlate it with the recent commits to find the regression source.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --debug 'Analyze the latest error logs and cross-reference with the last 3 commits.'

steps.title: Implement Defensive Design
steps.description: Design schema validation and error boundaries to prevent the bug from surfacing again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a Zod schema or TypeScript interface to enforce data integrity at this specific boundary.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --implement 'Add Zod validation to the API response handler to prevent runtime type errors.'

steps.title: Verify with Synthetic Tests
steps.description: Use AI to generate edge-case scenarios that would break your current implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate 5 edge-case test scenarios for this function, including null values and empty arrays.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --test 'Generate and run unit tests covering the 5 edge cases identified.'

pro_tips: Treat AI as a junior partner: Always review the logic it writes, never copy-paste blindly.
Use 'Contextual Anchoring' by providing the AI with the relevant file imports before asking for a fix.
When stuck, ask the AI to explain the code as if you were a beginner to uncover assumptions you missed.
Maintain a 'Bug Journal' where you log the AI's suggested fix and why it worked; this accelerates your learning curve.
Optimize for readability over brevity—AI-generated code is often dense; force it to add comments for future-you.
content.next_steps: Once your code is stable, focus on building a robust CI/CD pipeline to automate these tests, ensuring your project remains bug-free as you scale.
content.conversion_block: You now have the tools to conquer any error stack. Don't let a missing semicolon stop your momentum. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
